Verifies a chat on behalf of the organization which is represented by the bot.

Verifies a c chat on behalf of the organization which is represented by the bot.

Verifies a user on behalf of the organization which is represented by the bot.

Service messages for video chat started, filtered by Filter.videoChatStarted()

Video note (round video) messages, filtered by Filter.videoNote()
